message:
test(flush): Add comprehensive unit tests for LinkTableOp

Add extensive test coverage for the new many-to-many link table operations:

- Test link() and unlink() constructor methods with all parameters
- Test is_link() and is_unlink() type discriminators
- Test Debug trait formatting for diagnostic output
- Test Clone trait implementation preserves all fields
- Test empty operations vector handling
- Test multiple operations collection with filtering
- Test various Value types (BigInt, Text, Int) in link operations

These tests validate the LinkTableOp API surface and ensure correctness
for the many-to-many relationship flush system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
